{{Quote|I've heard of him... Enough to know he's a Rebel sympathizer.|[[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] to [[Nima Maas]]|<ref name="The Hovel on Terk Street">{{Tales|6|The Hovel on Terk Street}}</ref>}}
'''Temo Dionisio''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] politician who sympathized with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
Dionisio was living on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] some time before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. By that time a young girl named [[Nima Maas]], who was actually an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agent, worked for him.

He was wanted dead by the Galactic Empire and Nima was in charge of the mission. However, he was also wanted by [[Nok Derrick]] who kidnapped Temo to gain information about the Rebel Alliance, planning to sell it to the Empire. Nok was torturing him to extract the information when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] burst into Derrick's laboratory, killing his [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guard. He then threw a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] and freed Temo, blowing up the laboratory and Nok Derrick.

Nima then appeared and threatened Temo. Greedo attempted to escape, but when Nima threatened him, the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] killed her, saving Temo's life once again.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|6|The Hovel on Terk Street}} {{1st}}
